summary: Frontend testing of new Neural Axis sections. All 8 sections load correctly. New ProjectPortfolio (6 cards), ExpertProfile (Raj Yadav), Track Record (7-row trainings table + certifications), Hero social proof strip, 8 tech cards, updated footer all verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Section uses id='about' instead of id='track-record'. Navbar 'About' link scrolls to Track Record section - minor naming inconsistency but functionally works

action_items: Minor: Track Record section has id='about' - consider if 'track-record' id is needed for direct linking
seed_data_creation: Contact form submitted during testing; shows up in admin dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new sections verified: Hero (IBM/TCS/Wipro/Capgemini/NASSCOM strip), 8 Tech Cards (RAG, NLP, MLOps present), 6 Project cards, Expert Profile (Raj Yadav bio + 4 experience cards), Track Record (certifications + 7-row trainings table - section id is 'about' not 'track-record'), Footer (raj.yadav9312@gmail.com, +91 9265 802 045, Gujarat India). Admin login and dashboard work. Contact form submission works.
